title: tanacetum regelii
intro: Tanacetum regelii, also known as Kamchatka tansy, is a perennial herb native to the Kamchatka Peninsula in Russia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic agent, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tanacetum regelii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve menstrual cramps. Tanacetum regelii is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be found in capsule or oil form, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
